Metadata.title: Online Marketing Bakery
Metadata.description: Online Marketing Bakery — creative B2B marketing with character.

Footer.taglineLine1: Creative solutions. Strategic growth. Real results.
Footer.taglineLine2: Let's take your brand to the next level.

ContactSection.headline: We deliver the results you want.
ContactSection.paragraph1: Not everyone is ready for our approach. We don't just bake dozens of products.
ContactSection.paragraph2: – we create marketing with character for brands that dare.
ContactSection.bullet1: The guts to take a stand
ContactSection.bullet2: Ready to say goodbye to mediocrity
ContactSection.bullet3: Understand that doing what everyone else does won’t work
ContactSection.bullet4: Want a recipe that works, not just sounds good

Careers.heroDescription: Work with sharp people on real B2B brands. No vague decks — clear direction, measurable work, and room to grow your craft.

Hero.title: We build Brands People keep Coming Back For.
Hero.description: Together we bake campaigns that make your audience hungry. We help you take a position customers choose and competitors lose sleep over.
Hero.testimonial: Rubin and his team are all top performers in their field. We have been working together for two years now and are still amazed by their daily flexibility, speed and quality.

PageHero.description: Together we bake campaigns that make your audience hungry. We help you take a position customers choose and competitors lose sleep over.

Insights.headlineRest: in conversion rates with the new design.
Insights.body: If everything was going great, you would not be here right now. Our clients understand that. They hire us for expertise and accept the discussion that comes with it. Because politely continuing what does not work will cost you dearly.
Insights.slideSalonora: created a scalable booking software for the beauty industry with a professional website included
Insights.slideBeeldster: LinkedIn leadgeneration campaigns with an ROI of more than 400% (!)
Insights.slideStobe: new on-brand design and B2B targeting landing pages. Result: 68 percent increase in conversion
Insights.slideSlimkiezen: created a leadgeneration platform for the Belgium consumer market which resulted in a ton of leads in the first month
Insights.slideKarakter: created a content and leadgeneration strategy which resulted in results from the very first beginning

HomeServices.title: Your marketing is not working, and
HomeServices.description: Your competitor is growing while you stay stuck. You know something has to change. But what? And how?

Qualities.storyTitle: This is how we turn your story into results
Qualities.step1Body: You are stuck somewhere. We find out where. We dive into your market and ask the hard questions. That is where growth lives.
Qualities.step2Body: Marketing for everyone is marketing for no one. We help you choose who you want and who you do not want. That is scary but necessary.
Qualities.step3Body: Content, campaigns, social media, websites. Everything revolves around your story. Websites that convert. Campaigns that perform.
Qualities.step4Body: What works, we do more often. What does not work, we cut. We keep testing and adjusting until it hits.
Qualities.svcSeoDesc: We make you visible where customers search. Google, ChatGPT and all the places that matter.
Qualities.svcSeaDesc: We run and manage campaigns on Google and Meta with a focus on return and measurability.
Qualities.svcSocialDesc: We set up targeted campaigns on Meta and other platforms. Audience, message and budget aligned.
Qualities.svcContentDesc: We interview you and translate it into blogs, posts and pages. Your expertise, our words.
Qualities.svcWebDesc: We design and build websites that convert. From strategy to delivery in 4 to 8 weeks.
Qualities.svcStrategyDesc: Every project starts with a marketing strategy. Where are you going and how do you get there?

OurTeam.title: Your own team of world class B2B
OurTeam.description: Quality has no postcode. We build teams with the best specialists, no matter where they are. Remote work allows us to use top talent, with Rubin, owner of OMB, as your dedicated project manager.

ServicesDifference.title: Traditional vs OMB Effect
ServicesDifference.description: Traditional agencies work the way you are used to. Polite, predictable, safe. And without results. We choose a different approach. One that creates friction but also shine.
ServicesDifference.effect1: Online in 4 to 8 weeks Working together should feel like a celebration
ServicesDifference.effect2: We challenge your briefing, debate up front, celebration at the end.
ServicesDifference.effect3: Your story baked in a way that keeps customers hungry.
ServicesDifference.effect4: A brand with an opinion that keeps you up at night.
ServicesDifference.effect5: Too much noise online. Boring is not our thing.
ServicesDifference.effect6: Results that leave you wanting more.
ServicesDifference.traditional1: Online in 6 months. Endless meetings, no progress.
ServicesDifference.traditional2: We execute your briefing. No questions asked.
ServicesDifference.traditional3: A website with a lot of text. Nobody reads it.
ServicesDifference.traditional4: A brand that looks nice. Safe, forgettable, grey.
ServicesDifference.traditional5: We post 3x a week. Engagement? Not our problem.
ServicesDifference.traditional6: A nice report. With KPIs nobody cares about.

BlogHero.title: Hi, I am Rubin Koot.
BlogHero.intro: A motivated and detail-oriented professional with a strong focus on growth, quality, and innovation. I am passionate about developing effective solutions and continuously expanding my knowledge across technical and creative disciplines.

BlogsList.pill: List of the most recent write-up from Rubin

ContactPage.intro: Marketing does not get better by waiting. If you are ready to challenge what is not working and want an honest conversation about growth, you are in the right place.
ContactPage.heading: Let’s talk
ContactPage.subheading: New business or a concrete question?

AboutPage.heroDetails: Marketing does not need more noise. It needs direction. Since 2018, we have been helping B2B brands escape guesswork and turn marketing into something that actually delivers. No vague promises, no safe play. Just clear choices and measurable results.

OurGoal.missionMid: built for companies that are done playing it safe.
OurGoal.missionRest: we have been helping brands turn marketing from a cost into a growth engine. Not by following trends or copying competitors, but by
OurGoal.missionBold: making clear choices and standing behind them.
OurGoal.milestonesTitle: On a mission to become the world’s #1 B2B
OurGoal.milestonesBody: We did not get here by following the crowd. From day one, OMB was built around one belief: marketing should perform, or it should change. Every milestone marks a decision to raise the bar, challenge the obvious, and keep pushing forward.
OurGoal.milestone2018a: Rubin started the Onine Marketing Bakery in Roermond.
OurGoal.milestone2019a: Grew the OMB team to 4 members.
OurGoal.milestone2019b: Moved to our first big office with the team!
